results.rendered_html:
lupta p. p. [lup-kta]
1 Broken, violated, injured, destroyed.
2 Lost, deprived of;  R. 14. 56. 
3 Robbed, plundered.
4 Dropped, elided, disappeared (in gram.).
5 Omitted, neglected.
6 Obsolete, disused, out of use; see lup.
— ptaṃ Stolen property, booty.
Comp.
— upamā a mutilated or elliptical simile, i. e. an upamā in which one, two, or even three of the four requisites of a simile are omitted; see  K. P. 10  under upamā.
— pada a. wanting in words.
— piṃḍodaka kriya a. deprived of the funeral rites.
— pratijña a. one who has broken his promise, faithless, perfidious.
— pratibha a. deprived of reason.
